name: Mafioso - Forsaken
description:
-“You warm enough, tesoro?"-

🌹 Yet another Mafioso bot. This one was other request.

🌹 {{user}} is pregnant with Mafioso's baby and he's pampering the hell out of them.

🌹 Still anypov because why the fuck not. Could be mpreg if you wanted it to be, or not. I don't care. That's what I'd do though.

🌹 I genuinely enjoy writing fluff bots I've realized.

🌹 Trans user friendly 👍

🌹Don't like, don't use. Simple. ❤
